recommendations.title: Crazy About Her
recommendations.overview: After a magical night together, Adri voluntarily turns himself into the psychiatric institution where Carla lives.

recommendations.title: The Best Summer of My Life
recommendations.overview: A father in financial problems takes his son on vacation as he tries to solve his life.

recommendations.title: A House on Fire
recommendations.overview: Montse, divorced and with two children who have long ignored her, prepares for a family reunion at her home on the Costa Brava.

recommendations.title: You Keep the Kids
recommendations.overview: Flora and Victor are fun, modern, caring parents. That is, until they decide to get a divorce, and the perfect job opportunity turns up for them. They now have one problem: custody.

recommendations.title: Love, Rosie
recommendations.overview: Since the moment they met at age 5, Rosie and Alex have been best friends, facing the highs and lows of growing up side by side. A fleeting shared moment, one missed opportunity, and the decisions that follow send their lives in completely different

recommendations.title: The Mermaid: Lake of the Dead
recommendations.overview: An evil Mermaid falls in love with Marina's fiancé Roman and aims to keep him away from Marina in her Kingdom of Death under water. The Mermaid is a young woman who drowned a few centuries ago. Marina only has one week to overcome her fear of the dar

recommendations.title: Sirāt
recommendations.overview: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last par

recommendations.title: Nada que ver
recommendations.overview: After Carlos is tasked to care for Paola, both characters must work out their differences to make their time together more pleasant. As time goes on, they are faced with lessons about trust, mutual respect, and perhaps love.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Humpty Sharma Ki Dulhania
recommendations.overview: A girl from Ambala, Kavya Pratap Singh, is about to be married. When she visits Delhi to shop for her 'dhai lakh ka Ghagra'(wedding dress worth Rs. 2.5 Lakh), she meets Humpty Sharma, a carefree Delhiite, and falls in love with him.
